title: Section 71
content: When the mortgaged property is as lease 1***, and the mortgagor obtains a renewal of the lease, the mortgagee, in the absence of a contract to the contrary, shall, for the purposes of the security, be entitled to the new lease.
footnote: 1. The words "for a term of years" omitted by Act 20 of 1929, s. 36.
